commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And when king David came to Bahurim, behold, there came out a man of the family of the house of Saul, whose name was Shimei, the son of Gera: he came forth, and cursed continually as he came. Bahurim, a fortress of Benjamin, about an hour's walk east of Bethania. (Adrichomius xxviii. ) It signifies, "chosen youths "and it is called Almut, or Almon, "youth "1 Paralipomenon vi. 60 Hither Phaltiel conducted Michol, chap.
